ACME CORPORATION

FORM 8-K CURRENT REPORT

Item 2.02 Results of Operations and Financial Condition

ACME Corporation reported fourth quarter 2025 revenue of $2,850,000,000 and net income of $410,000,000.

Earnings per diluted share were $1.87 for the quarter ended December 31, 2025.

Operating income was $520,000,000.
